title: Shyam Singha Roy
subTitle: A director accused of plagiarism finds a transcendental connection to his past life when he digs deeper into his subconscious mind.

title: Yashoda
subTitle: Surrogate mother Yashodha is advised to follow a few guidelines to keep herself and her baby healthy and safe. However, something happens at the surrogate centre that puts both of them at risk.

title: Chiriyo Chiri
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes and videos from various famous Malayalam movies.

title: PK
subTitle: A naive alien comes to Earth where he loses his device. As he spends time on the planet looking for it, he raises many thought-provoking questions that capture the attention of a journalist.

title: Doctor's Talk
subTitle: Dr.Eeppan, the host, interacts and discusses about various health problems with guest doctors and gives remedial tips for the viewers.

title: The Warriorr
subTitle: Satya, a doctor, is brutally beaten and driven out of his city by Guru, a ruthless gangster. However, Satya returns two years later as a police officer to exact revenge on Guru.

title: Aathi
subTitle: A young boy moves to Chennai for his education where he meets a girl and falls in love with her. Soon, they learn that they are both on a mission to avenge the death of their parents.

title: Vettai Puli
subTitle: A newly appointed officer is tasked with eliminating an extortion gang in the city. Unbeknownst to him, the gang's leader is someone close to him.
Armed with the art of modern warfare, Huang Xing and Sun Yat-sen lead an uprising against the Qing Dynasty that eventually that results in the founding of a new nation.

title: Puli
subTitle: Marudheeran goes on a quest to bring back his love, Pavazhamalli, who was kidnapped by the Vedhalams, a group that possesses mystical powers. He must face Yavanarani, a sorceress, and her aide.

title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Dheeran Adhyayam Onnu
subTitle: A police officer is assigned the task of solving the mystery behind a series of murders. Upon thoroughly investigating, he discovers a common thread that binds all the murders together.

title: Kumki
subTitle: Bomman, a mahout, and his elephant are assigned to protect the crops of a hill tribe from a rogue elephant. However, his life takes a turn when he falls in love with the village leader's daughter.

title: Thuppakki
subTitle: An army officer sets out to save the people of his country when he learns that an entire network of terrorists are operating in the city and are planning to carry out multiple terror attacks.

title: Detective Dee: Rats Invasion
subTitle: When a rodent infestation leaves the city in ruins, the catastrophe strands the citizens. Di Renjie begins probing which leads him to the root cause of the problems.

title: Ee Pattanathil Bhootham
subTitle: An evil magician releases a friendly spirit and orders him to make money through crime. However, the spirit falls into the hands of circus children after the sorcerer loses him in an accident.

title: Rajini Murugan
subTitle: Rajini Murugan, an out of work man, falls for Karthika but her father objects their relationship due to a misconception. Later, the situation improves after Rajini inherits his grandfather's property.

title: Sooryavamsi
subTitle: The head of India's Anti-Terrorism Squad, Sooryavanshi, fights against all odds to take down a deadly terrorist group tied to his past.

title: Anjaan
subTitle: Krishna travels to Mumbai to look for his missing brother Raju. However, things take a turn when learns that Raju was a notorious gangster in the city.

title: Vivegam
subTitle: Ajay Kumar, a former counter-terrorism agent, is called for a special mission. However, he is betrayed by his friends and is accused of extremely treasonous acts.

title: The Legend of Loulan
subTitle: When young archaeologist Wu Tian finds a mirror from the Loulan civilisation, he goes on a mission to protect the treasure of the civilisation and uncover the secrets of the mysterious Ghost Army.

title: Thuruppugulan
subTitle: Menon buys land for his five-star hotel and asks his trusted employee, Sreedharan Unnithan, to take its charge. Years later, Unnithan gets Menon imprisoned in a fake case and Kunjumon helps him.

title: Thalainagaram 2
subTitle: Right, a former gangster, swears off violence to become a real estate agent. However, he is forced to return to his old ways when three criminals try to frame him for a crime.
